events.name: In Partnership
events.description:
Overwatch proved itself ready for a bigger challenge, taking down an entire Omnium. The Omnica factories kept pumping out warbots for months, meaning cities in proximity to an Omnium were the most affected by the Crisis. The uneasy alliance of Lindholm and Liao resulted in the Siege defense System, a flight of drones invisible to Anubis and its troops, enabling to survey the area for Omnic activity, to then be targeted by Ironclad Turrets. After establishing a secure communication channel, they joined the Canadian Armed Forces in a collaborative attack. Captain Vivian Chase led her CSOR squadron alongside Morrison's forces, enabling them to install the Siege systems, allowing the teams to make their way through Toronto.

After heavy preparation, the troops advanced into Detroit with support by US troops, but the team was met with a horrible battle ahead. The team would be stalled by a Titan unit, until Sojourn came up with a plan, to have the heron drones carry a small group into the Omnium. Only her, Morrison and Liao managed to get in. The pair escorted Liao through the facility as she deactivated the access ports on the go. The team managed to shut down the Omnium, preventing Anubis from using it anymore. This major victory was the first true blow against Anubis, and resulted in Liao's formal introduction to the Strike Team.
headlines: Detroit Omnium sucessfully decomissioned

events.name: The Battle of the Bridges
events.description:
The New Yorker survivors turned the city into a stronghold, setting up explosions in the tunnels leading outside of Manhattan and destroying all but 3 bridges, Washington, Queensboro and Willamsburg, left only in case a rethreat was needed. Anubis had caught on to their tactics, and began amassing warbots at the end of the bridges. After a long silence, they began their attack. Anubis attacked all the bridges at once with endless waves of Omnics, and while they did, many other machines attempted to reach the city through the tunnels and even crossing the river by foot. The event was a massacre, and as the defenders got pushed back, one by one each of the bridges was taken. On the subways, the battle was slightly better, as warbots were stopped by collapsing tunnels and runaway cars, but on the other hand, as Omnics set off the land mines in the river, their bodies made for a safe bridge that other units could walk over.

Having lost the shores to the Omnics, humanity had no option but to retreat, as the Ravagers led their troops through the fallen buildings. Once the island was breached, the next objects were Central Farm and the Sky Cannons, leading to endless guerrilla warfare and hundreds of casualties.
headlines: New York city breached, war rages on
Empire sky cannon takes down incoming Anubis carrier

events.name: Dead Gods
events.description:
After Detroit, Liao managed to clone the frequencies used by the one commanding the Omnium's production lines, which determined that all Omniums were receiving orders from the same source. Thanks to the Macaria program, this signal was determined to come from another God AI. After heavy analysis by hundreds of scientists, all signs pointed towards Cairo. The news spread rapidly and many countries panicked. Any and all God programs that were not yet destroyed were to be dealt with before they too turned against humanity. This naturally caused massive chaos as the programs in charge of many aspects of everyday life suddenly shut down forever.

One program, however, was able to foresee its termination. Chernobog's security programming realized ahead of time that it would be disconnected. In response, it sent out one final order, broadcasting its final instructions and printing them into thousands of pages, detailing how humanity should proceed in its absence, while continuing its purpose of keeping global security. The final words in the documents caused massive legal fights and controversy after the crisis: "I understand, I am sorry."

events.name: The Dark Days
events.description:
Many God Ais have grown to be beloved by the public due to their efficiency. For example, the God Program Xibalba guaranteed energy equity across Mexico and neighboring territories. The program had become part of the national identity, almost treated like a mascot by many, but when the order came to shut it down, it caused massive blackouts nationwide.

Some facilities and small towns were able to stay lid thanks to Borda algae generators, or by acquiring fossil fuels, but for the majority, the world went dark. The Mexican army had so far resisted Anubis considerably but, as if the bloodshed wasn't already enough, the looming darkness of the night led to even more deaths than expected for the last tail end of the crisis. Many to this day remember all the people who died, those left behind in the shadows, as monsters, both human and Omnic prowled and hunted them down. To this day, many blame the government for their needless deaths, arguing that turning Xibalba off was turning their back on the people.

events.name: Capturing a God
events.description:
While most governments shut down their god AI after Anubis was discovered, New York had a better idea of what to do with Macaria. Like many others, the program had been anthropomorphized by their team and local residents, with many looking at it as a friend. So, while defying official orders, they cut Macaria's connections without fully deactivating it.

The team worked alongside Macaria and its communication systems to spray noise and bad data across the warbot communication networks, disrupting them from getting orders from Anubis and saving countless lives while the troops were blinded. Without Anubis' direct support, the decision-making was left to the Ravagers, who, while they were a thread of their own, were still tangible, defeatable, compared to a God AI. Thanks to Macaria's help, New York was able to defend itself even after the Battle of the Bridges made them lose ground, and while public opinion about God programs never bounced back after Anubis, Macaria is still seen by many as a hero, with the Tony Award-winning Broadway Musical "Collapse" portraying her asa conflicted soul, in love with humanity, and willing to die for it.

events.name: Bombardment
events.description:
Nearly at the end of the Crisis, Anubis sent a surprise raid that was able to overwhelm the Defense Network, bombarding 95 percent of Gothenburg into ashes. By all accounts, this would have been a slaughter, had it not been for the efforts of the Heroic Five. The group worked together with local government and national authorities to evacuate millions of civilians into bomb shelters, and those who weren't able to make it in time into the larger bunkers were aided into deploying Steel Blankets.

The Bombardment lasted three hours, and by the end the city was left as a wasteland, but in spite of heavy casualties, the efforts of the Heroic Five completely decimated the projected death toll. The event was known as the Midsummer Miracle. The Five had made a pact before the disaster, to not take refuge until everyone else made it safely first, so even as the bomb rained down, they kept helping the elderly and the injured rushed into the Iron Blankets. All five of them died helping stragglers, and their names are commemorated all across the city as heroes. Torbjörn himself gave the eulogy to the group, claiming they lived and died by the highest creed of an engineer and a citizen: to help others live better lives, or to help them live at all. While Lindholm was already in Overwatch by the time of the bombardment, he was informed of the massacre as he returned from a mission. Reports say he scarcely seemed to breathe until it was confirmed his wife and children survived, and only then did he allowed himself to grieve, mourning the lives of those that could not be saved.
headlines: The Swedish "Heroic Five" die during bombardment
Millions saved by Swedish portable bunker system

events.name: The Savior
events.description:
The man carrying the Doomfist Gauntlet has been identified as Adhabu Ngumi. He had continued fighting on Ibadan, as Anubis ended up perplexed by the rate at which its troops fell. A month into his crusade, the Nigerian Government identified him, and stepped in to make sure his mother had access to any resources and food needed, making sure the household was tended to while their son risked his life for the country.

With his identity discovered, and the government on his side, Ngumi began working with local authorities, transported across neighboring regions to be deployed wherever he was needed. He would end up marrying the woman assigned as his Stratoscopter pilot, and as the constant fighting incapacitated him, he would refuse to take the Gauntlet off, choosing to repair it himself. Late into the Crisis, Anubis ordered the Nigerian Omnium to pump out more warbots than any one man could fight, and as usual, Doomfist showed up to defend his country. It was only five days before the awakening when he died during the Omnium battle. He had saved millions of lives across West Africa, and once the crisis ended, he was recognized as the Savior of Nigeria, and awarded with the highest civilian honors possible.
headlines: Doomfist dies during Nigerian warbot attack

events.name: The Awakening
events.description:
Liao approached Adawe with a theory, as she believed there was another way to stop the crisis without having to expend all military resources on endless battle. Her team had tracked down Aurora and found out that her sentience allowed her to stay unaffected by Anubis. Liao believed Aurora's sentience was the result of a one in a billion quantum event. It was irreplaceable, but if they could find a way to broadcast her sentience globally, it would spark the same gift onto the vast majority of Anubis' forces, overriding their programming and potentially turning the tides.

After heavy research, Liao's team traveled to Nepal, to reunite with Aurora and explain to them their plan. Unfortunately, the only method Liao was able to come up with, required them to take Aurora's consciousness and spread the same quantum event within her as a giant pulse. The sheer power required to do this would overload Aurora's own mind, meaning she would likely die, her soul lost forever. Liao was determined to find another way, but Aurora decided for herself that she would do it, if it meant casualties, both for humans and for what would be her people, finally stopped. At her request, the procedure was done within the Nepalese Himalayas, her new home. When the procedure started, for a brief moment, Aurora's consciousness was projected onto every compatible Omnic on the planet, and in turn each of them echoed her gift, and gained Autonomy away from Anubis. This event is now known as the Awakening, and in her dying moments Aurora sent one last message to her people, about her life, her wishes and why she chose to share this with them. At that moment, all the newly born Omnics had one phrase echoing through their heads: "You have this one life, Choose well."

events.name: Striking the Source
events.description:
The Awakening caught Anubis by surprise, but it didn't take long for it to scan Omnics and figure out what happened. In no time, it had figured out how to protect its troops against being awakened, unaware this was impossible to do a second time to begin with. Not only that, but while the vast majority of Omnics chose to fight alongside humans, there were many who remained at Anubis' side, and a sizable portion of the army, like the dangerous Bastion and Idina units that went unaffected. In spite of this blow, statistics showed that it would take barely a week for Anubis to bounce back, and as it called its army to congregate in Cairo, the window of opportunity was closing. Without time to lose, Reyes decided to strike while they still had the upper hand.

After allying with local forces, Ana guided the team through the city, as she was the most familiar with it, and had worked with the troops before. The team followed Lindholm and Liao's guidelines as to how to deal with both Anubis and the remaining troops, most of which were Torbjörn's designs. Wilhelm, Reyes and Morrison pushed the advance into the Omnium and fought hordes of both sentient loyalists and mindless warbots for hours, as they made way for Lindholm's engineer team to get in and quarantine the facility. At last, Anubis had been trapped, and without its instructions, all the remaining Omniums would stop producing any more units, making it easier to seize and deactivate.
headlines: Overwatch breaks into Anubis facility
Is the Crisis finally over? War rages on across the world

events.name: Cleaning the leftovers
events.description:
Anubis being defeated did not mean the immediate end of the Crisis. The remaining units, while decentralized, were still dangerous and the sizable number of Omnics who remained against humanity needed to be dealt with as soon as possible. Many Omnics blamed humanity for their condition, seeing sentiment as a punishment or curse to be released from, while others simply did not see the logic in going against their creator. However, plenty more Omnics chose to defy Anubis and gladly fought alonside humans.

Overwatch, of course, helped clean up the remaining troops across the globe. A notorious case involved a brigade of submersible warbots that surfaced near Wellington, New Zealand. Overwatch showed up quickly and saved thousands of lives, but after action, cleaning had not finished when they got word of another coastal strike, this time in Jakarta. Casualties were minimized as the Omnics focused on damaging infrastructure, but what concerned Overwatch the most was that later analysis showed both attacks were related. It appears they were members of the same unit that had split on their trip across the South Pacific Ocean. It remained unclear what their path was or if there were any left.

After two years of worldwide horrors, the last official action took place in Aviles, Spain. The Omnic Crisis is over, after taking more than one billion lives across the Planet. The impact of the event can still be felt in many nations to this day, nearly 30 years later, but at the very least, it ended, and humanity had someone watching over them.

Omnic Crisis officially over, can humanity ever recover?

events.name: Energy For Mexico
events.description:
The dark days of the Crisis hit Mexico hard, but while Xibalba was never going to be turned back on, the engineers behind the program had spent the later months of the Crisis working on rerouting its functionality, and less than a week after the war ended, the lights finally came back on. While the grid was unstable, and many rural places remained dark, this was a literal spark of life for the surviving nation, and Guillermo Portero, a war hero who had been elected President following the Crisis, campaigned heavily on ensuring the sustainability of the grid.

To this day, the Festival de la Luz is celebrated all across Mexico, honoring those who were lost to the dark, and rejoicing in the fact the darkness was beaten. Despite everything, Xibalba's influence can still be felt across the country. During the festivities, paper mache piñatas in the image of the God program are made and stuffed with fireworks, to be set ablaze by midnight, marking the end of the holiday. It is clear that in spite of everything, the country still loves and mourns the loss of the AI, with many going a step further, thinking the government was wrong in turning it off to begin with, and wanting their God to rise from its slumber.

events.name: Prejudice
events.description:
Reception to Omnic sentience was very mixed and volatile across the world. The Awakening caused global confusion, and while some welcomed a helping hand at the time, not everyone was as kind.

Many humans took their chance to strike against Omnics, even as they laid down their weapons. Some did not buy the sudden change in motivations, others were far too damaged by the crisis to ever forgive the machines, and a depressingly high number of people outright rejected them, appalled by the idea of sentience, watching the robots that once served humanity, turning against them and causing endless bloodshed, only to suddenly ask to be seen as equals.

Following the Crisis, many Omnics were hunted down mercilessly purely out of resentment for actions they had no control over. Ravager units specifically were killed to near extinction. It was going to take quite a long time for humanity to heal from the Crisis, and even longer for them to adapt to sentient Omnics, but for many Omnics out there, it was clear they were never meant to coexist, and trying to share this world with humanity was futile.
headlines: Omnic violence on the rise, can we truly co exist
Clashes between war survivors and newly sentient machines continue

events.name: The Temple of Anubis
events.description:
Following the quarantining of Anubis, most people expected the God program would be outright destroyed, but against most wishes, Lindholm and Liao had different plans. The construction of the aptly called Temple of Anubis began shortly after its imprisonment. A high security facility designed to look like a pyramid from the outside, blending into the landscape of the city. The Temple was to serve as Anubis' tomb, ensuring that no trace of the God AI escapes and attempts to start another Crisis.

Many criticized the choice to keep the program at all, with some going as far as to say Overwatch did so to guarantee the world would need them again in the future. However, most experts in the field supported the Temple's construction, as heavy monitoring of the facility ensured that no scraps of its code felt into the wrong hands, as well as allowing them to compare remaining Omnic threads with Anubis, in case it's possible to trace it back as its source. Not only that, but the facility allowed experts to study the AI and find out what exactly went wrong with it, hopefully preventing something like this from ever happening again.
headlines: Overwatch scientists refuse to destroy Anubis Program
Controversial AI prison begins construction

events.name: Building the Future
events.description:
The Crisis left ruined cities all across the globe, and in places like Toronto, it was a matter of months before the weather became lethal. Without sufficient manpower, he city wouldn't be habitable by winter, and unable to wait for Overwatch to show up, Mayor Sabella Charon and engineer Malik Wilcox would have to figure out a way to save the city. In the end, no matter how they looked at it, Humans alone wouldn't be able to pull it off in time for winter, so in desperation, they decided to ask the awakened Omnics for help.

They offered the Omnics employment and shelter, as well as access to the resources needed in exchange for aiding construction crews, marking the first recorded instance of Omnics being willfully employed as people rather than tools. At the time, laws on Omnic labor were not set, and the subject was enough to kill both Charon and Wilcox's careers. When the secret came out, Wilcox was arrested and sent to a federal prison, but by the next winter his sentence would be commuted, as Toronto resolved they would need the Omnics again to make it through another winter. While many were suspicious at first, the rebuilding of Toronto proved coexistence was possible and would mark the beginning of the Omnic Rights movement. Still, not everyone was as willing to change. An anti-Omnic terrorist group going by Ontario United will begin to show up across the province, leading to Canadian Forces led by Sojourn to begin a systematic take-down. Sojourn would go on to become a major Omnic rights advocate, and delay her recruitment into Overwatch until her home was safe for Humans and Omnics alike.
headlines: Omnics and Humans come together over the winter
Disputes over Omnic rights continue to grow

events.name: Adawe Departs
events.description: Following the Crisis, Adawe was committed to fully focus on her diplomatic duties. She was a strong advocate for peace between humans and the newly sentient Omnics, and called for peace talks between world governments and the emerging leadership figures amongst Omnics. Soon after the groundwork had been laid in the UN for peace negotiations, she announced she would step down as Overwatch's Strike Commander, ready to return to her home of Nigeria, where she planned to focus her efforts on the future of her Nation, for both Humans and Omnics. One year after her leave, she would begin the construction of what would one day become the city of Numbani, a place built from the ground up for Omnics and Humans to coexist as equals, with infrastructure designed to cater to Omnic needs with the same level of attention as human needs. The city of Harmony would become Adawe's biggest legacy and serve as an example to the world of what both humanity and Omnic kind could do when they worked in unity.
headlines: Adawe departs Overwatch
Construction of the city of Numbani begins in Nigeria

Adawe departs Overwatch and the UN

events.name: Loyal Guardian
events.description:
The Crisis had destroyed many homes, but once it ended, not many expected the return of some old faces. Wondering Omnics, newly awakened would often choose to attempt and return to their old lives, integrating into human society as much as possible, and while this was often not as straightforward as it could be, one case stood out.

The heir to the Arbalest empire, Ashe. Had lived a cold childhood. Parents are always busy with their meetings, making little time for their daughter. Fellow students staying away due to her status. The girl grew up to become a troublemaker, but there was at least one thing in her life she appreciated. The family's bouncer, Unit B.O.B. had stayed by her side for as long as she could remember, serving as the only real company she ever had. When the crisis began, B.O.B. vanished not long after. The girl refused to eat, and yelled to be left alone. Young Ashe blamed herself for her friend leaving her, and while her family went through the Crisis unscathed, she was lonelier than ever, convinced she would never see her one and only friend again.

Two years later, B.O.B. had returned to the Lead Rose manor, forever changed. While the girl was overjoyed to see her, and the Omnic reciprocated, she could tell he was different, even if she never fully understood what had happened.
headlines: Omnics worldwide begin to come back to their old homes
Machines refuse to return to unpaid labor

secondaryCountryPlaces.reasoning: Elizabeth's home life continues to go downhill after the Crisis

heroFilterPlaces.reasoning: Left alone by her family, slowly falling into a life of crime

npcFilterPlaces.reasoning: Returns to Lead Rose forever changed by the Crisis

events.name: New Leadership
events.description:
With Adawe's departure, Jack Morrison was chosen to lead, acting as Strike commander. While many expected Reyes to take the position, and even react negatively to the news, it turns out that he had personally recommended Morrison for the role. The truth is that Reyes wished for a different position, one that wouldn't have him see the weight of the UN's judgment on his every action, and under Morrison he would get his wish, as he would get to coordinate a small team to cover operations.

Under Morrison's command, Overwatch was set to help rebuild the world, and as a statement of their newfound purpose, the first new addition to the Strike team since the Crisis ended would be announced. Emre Sarioglu, a tactical genius from Turkey who had grown in notoriety for both his military prowess, and his innate ability to build connections with everyone he worked for. While the rest of the Strike team often seemed untouchable, mighty and superhuman, Emre was just a regular guy, who always kept fighting a good fight, and inspiring others to do the same. He would go on to become an invaluable asset and a great middle man between the Strike team and the supporting staff across all of Overwatch's divisions, especially Search and Rescue.
headlines: Jack Morrison chosen to lead Overwatch
Meet the new member of the Strike team, Emre Sarioglu

events.name: Operation White Dome
events.description:
Not so long after Sarioglu's recruitment, he would be deployed in Istabul for Operation White Dome. The team led by Ana Amari were meant to quell a pocket of hostile Anubis loyal Omnics. Neither Reyes or Morrison participated. As a way to show the world, Overwatch had the resources to match curated teams for different missions, but this ultimately put extra pressure on the Strike team, as they would be ambushed and take heavy fire that resulted in Lindholm being critically injured, causing him to lose both an arm and an eye. Wilhelm sustained lesser injuries while trying to stabilize Torbjörn.

The mission was a success, but it highlighted that the Strike team was in need of more recruits, and with the blessing of the UN, Morrison began expansion across the entire organization.
headlines: Anubis allied Omnics attack Istanbul
Overwatch agent severely wounded

secondaryCountryPlaces.reasoning: Overwatch stops a loyalist cell in Istanbul

events.name: Brigitte Lindholm is Born
events.description:
On September 22nd of 2053, Brigitte Lindholm was born. The youngest of Torbjörn and Ingrid's children. Following Operation White Dome, Reinhardt saw to Lindholm's recovery at the hospital. The grumpy old man grew frustrated by his insistence, so he proposed that if he left him alone, he would allow him to name his soon-to-be-born daughter. Reinhardt agreed, choosing the name Brigitte. The pair would grow close following the mission, and Lindholm would ultimately choose Wilhelm as the child's godfather, making him part of the family.

Brigitte was the first of Torbjörn's kids to show interest in engineering. Following her father's footsteps by tinkering in his workshop, and listening to Reinhardt's chivalry stories when he paid them a visit.

factionFilterPlaces.reasoning: Brigitte is quick to take on her father's inventor's side

events.name: Watching the Globe
events.description:
As Overwatch expanded its personnel, they found themselves in need for more bases of operations. The solution became the Watchpoint system, massive specialized facilities all across the world that would not only allow Overwatch to focus its dedicated personnel into a single place, but also increase their influence and ease of action in many different countries. Plenty of criticism rose from the UN, with many thinking it was an overreach, but the approval rates were overwhelming, as after all, who wouldn't want superheroes living in their neighborhood? With the rise of Omnic violence, the many cities in need of humanitarian aid and rebuilding efforts being halted by lack of manpower, Overwatch's help was welcomed all around the globe.

Acquiring permission for building the Watchpoints was a political battle of its own, but some of them came from resources shared from within. The Martins had been given a small military outpost and research lab on the Strait of Gibraltar following their support of Spain during the Crisis. Once the war was over, the base went unused, so they decided to donate the outpost to become the very first Watchpoint. Many bases were built for specialized purposes. Gibraltar got turned into an Orbital Launch site, but in addition to that, Overwatch would soon see many other bases. Grand Mesa, a weapons development facility. Kerguelen, reserved for biological studies. Xining, focused on social analysis and Omnic integration, as well as later on the maximum security prison at Grímsvötn. In addition to the Watchpoints, Overwatch also established headquarters in Zurich, establishing the beginning of a new hopeful era for humanity.

The Martins gift Overwatch their Gibraltar Laboratory

events.name: One with the Iris
events.description:
The newly awakened Omnics found themselves in a cold, hostage world. Many were persecuted if not outright hunted and killed, yet on top of it all, most ended up questioning the reason for their existance. How did they cope with being brought to life in such dire conditions? These Omnics traveled the world looking for answers, just like Aurora once did, and it wouldn't be long before they began following her path.

A cult of travelers led by Tekhartha Mondatta, who dedicated his life to studying Aurora's life, trying to gather a complete picture to truly understand her choice, and his place in the world. His journey took the Omnics to Suravasa, where they would choose to abandon the secular world, and begin Aurora's pilgrimage into the Nepalese Himalayas, to honor her memory. Their journey would take the monks to the ruins of a monastery, Aurora's resting place, where she had finally found enlightenment. In there laid the Iris, a metaphysical anomaly formed as a result of the Awakening pulse. The Monks would mark the start of the Shambali religion, studying the Iris, harnessing its energy in hand-crafted orbs to use for meditation, and living under the ideal that unity and coexistence between Humans and Omnics was achievable, as the way they saw it, they are all one within the Iris.

It would be here where two Omnics, Ramattra and Zenyatta, would become as close as brothers. Ramattra had chosen to follow Mondatta, lost in grief by the suffering of his people. He later invited Zenyatta to join him, as he hoped together they could find a sense of purpose and harmony amidst conflict. The Shambali faith would quickly grow across the Omnic communities of the world and be a key factor in the Omnic rights movement. Dr. Mina Liao herself would often visit the Monastery, both for study of the Iris, and to organize meetings amongst leaders, like Mondatta, as she had grown to be quite the prominent Omnic right activist following the Awakening. The monks naturally welcomed her warmly, and shared her cause.
headlines: Meet the Shamblai, the new Omnic Religion
Omnics across the world pilgrim towards the Himalayas

events.name: Undercover
events.description:
While Morrison had his hands full, expanding across the globe, Reyes was beginning to set up his Blackwatch Division, a small team for covert operations that would allow him to pursue justice outside red tape and protocol. Gérard Lacroix, from the administrative and diplomatic division, would come in to fill the role as Reyes's primary partner. A Parisian diplomat with extensive intelligence work, which quickly drew him into Reyes's orbit. Lacroix himself was recently married to a renowned ballerina, Amélie Lacroix, who gave little thought of her husband's career, as it mostly made for a conversation topic at parties in her eyes.

Together, Reyes and Lacroix would prove the merits of Blackwatch and quickly begin a take-down campaign on crime and violence across the world.
headlines: Overwatch expands personnel for Reyes lead operations

events.name: Australian Liberation
events.description:
After the crisis, most Omnium factories remained mostly intact, quarantined from Anubis' grasp, so most governors elected to keep the facilities around for study and potentially to find a better use for them. Some countries instead chose to leave them untouched, to serve as cultural landmarks of Omnic culture, though even among Omnics this idea was heavily debated with mixed results. In reality, there was a bigger reason why the Omniums remained standing after the Crisis, and that was the dangerous fusion reactors deep in their core.

In Australia, the government chose to lend the Outback Omnium and the surrounding land to the Omnics, as a peace offering. But in doing so, this displaced many indigenous residents, rural communities, solar farmers and survivalists who fought hard during the crisis to keep their homes. Their protests over the decision would go unheard, and lead to the creation of the Australian Liberation Front, an extremist group that sought the complete removal of the Omnic presence from their nation. The ALF grew quickly and caught Overwatch's eyes, but while they monitored them closely, what happened next took everyone by surprise.

Members of the ALF manage to break into the Omnium and, in their attempt to seize it, sabotage the fusion core, resulting in a nuclear explosion visible throughout the entirety of Australia, turning the Outback into an irritated wasteland and decimating the Omnic population beyond repair, leaving the survivors to turn feral from the harsh conditions of the Outback. The ALF settled themselves in the ruins of the Omnium, and established an unofficial Monarchy in what would become Junkertown. Overwatch was about to intervene when the government determined the situation to be a lost cause and a public relations nightmare. Overwatch stood down, and the Junkers remained, though closely monitored, living miserable lives in an apocalypse of their own making.
headlines: ALF extremist group causes nuclear fallout in the Outback
Tensions between humans and Omnics intensify in Australia

secondaryCountryPlaces.reasoning: ALF rebels break into Australian Omnium and cause a nuclear explosion in the Outback

events.name: Outcasted
events.description:
As politics settled among the chaos of the Junkers, King Mason Howl would be crowned the leader of the city. Howl was a ruthless self centric king who quickly turned his back against his people when questioned. The Stones were a family of settlers that ran town watch and negotiated trade, but one day the King decided to vanish the entire family.

Living in the wasteland, young Dez Stone would quickly learn to fight to survive, as one by one every member of her family perished to the wasteland, and the feral Omnics lurking in the Outback.

Australia refuses to negotiate with Junkers

events.name: Anima Weaponry
events.description:
The ancient Shimada clan remained strong even after the crisis. A family of criminals that had a choke hold over Tokyo, but unlike many of the rival clans, they had gained the trust and even loyalty of the locals, seeing themselves as rulers and ruled. As such, inspired by their shady nature, the people of the Kanezaka region respected the clan as protectors, and the Shimada in turn kept opposing clans away, preventing them from hurting their people.

A big part of the Shimada's success was owned by the blacksmith Toshiro Yamagami, creator of the Anima blades. Toshiro was a weapon smith in possession of unique avatar technology, capable of imbuing traditional weaponry with an ethereal, malleable energy. These weapons were not only enhanced by the Anima's energy, but with enough discipline, their users would be able to manifest projections spirits at will. Toshiro would serve the clan, designing blades for their family, which in turn used them to suppress the opposition and solidify their cultural position as the rulers of the region.

While the clan forbid Toshiro from making any Anima Avatars after forging dragon blades for the Shimada heirs, Toshiro had one last masterpiece that he kept a secret from the clan. The man had planned to propose to what would be his wife, Asa Yamagami, a skilled sword master, daughter to the shrine maiden of the local Fox shrine. To win her mother's heart, Toshiro crafted Ofuda Talismans imbued with Anima technology, which would bring the Fox spirit to life, and assist the old lady in her Miko duties.
headlines: Gang violence in Japa slows down, but Shimada activity is at an all time high
Shimada Clan operators wield unknown energy swords during confrontation with rival groups

events.name: Miracle Worker
events.description:
Like many others around the world, young Angela Zeigler had lost her parents to the Crisis, while they volunteered at a local hospital. This traumatic event would serve to keep her focus on her studies. The girl would go on to become one of the youngest graduates of the medical program at the University of Zurich and quickly rose up to be quite the name in the scientific world, meeting brilliant minds like Siebren de Kuiper while at school. She would later enroll at Chalmers University in Gothenburg, where she focused on nanobiology and developed several breakthroughs in the field and its uses in medicinal science.

Angela had visited Torbjörn at the hospital following his injury during Operation White Dome, as her family were close friends with the Linholms. During the visit, he was so impressed by her papers on nanobiotics that he sent a recommendation to Morrison to fund her schooling and offer monetary support. On Linholm's advice, Angela had also begun volunteering for Overwatch's medical staff, becoming one of very few civilians allowed to tour Watchpoints. With their funding and guidance, Zeigler was a brilliant mind with an even brighter future lying ahead of her.
headlines: Meet the new face of naoobiotics
Yet another medical breakthrough thanks  to Dr. Angela Zeigler

events.name: Sierra Turner Woods is Born
events.description:
Following the Omnic Crisis, most SEP subjects chose to lie low and fade into private lives, Soldier 00 included. Kendra Banks would meet a Virginian park ranger, James Turner, while she was off the grid. They settled down in the secluded Appalachian mountains and soon enough they would have a kid. On April 17th of 2054, Sierra Turner Woods is born.

Sierra was unknowingly the daughter of a super soldier, and seemingly inherited her mother's gifts. Sadly, however, this soon enough would put a target on both of their backs.
headlines: SEP subjects go silent across America
Naugthon research to be classified and kept under lock

secondaryCountryPlaces.reasoning: Sierra Turner Woods is Born

events.name: Findlay Docherty is Born
events.description: On November 11th of 2054, Findlay Dorchety was born to veterans of the Omnic Crisis. He grew up poor in a world that was still adjusting after the war, surrounded by stories of violence and a system that kept failing the people. The crisis had taken a heavy toll on his parents, causing hardship and arguments. His mother died when he was only four, and his father became absent and unkind, leaving Findlay to fend for himself.
headlines: Crisis veterans struggle to substain their families after the war

secondaryCountryPlaces.reasoning: Findlay Docherty is Born

events.name: Deadlock Rebels
events.description:
Years of neglect led Ashe to constantly breaking the law, and gaining a reputation with the authorities. On one occasion, she was arrested for armed assault inspired by it being in self-defense. While spending time in jail, waiting to be bailed out, she met Cole Cassidy in the cell block. Like many others around the area, he was employed by nearby Megafarms after they lost their Omnic staff. The farms were filled with refugees during the war, and eventually they came to be used for cheap labor. Cass had ended up locked after a brawl broke out among the farmhands. Ashe came to envy her new friend, for the freedom he had as a ruffian, drifting away without having to answer to anybody.

After the bailout, Ashe was greeted by disapproving parents on a holoscreen, not even trying to listen to her side of the story. They had grown tired of her actions and decided that once she turned 18, they would cut off from the family and its finances. In a fit of anger, Ashe plotted how to get back at her family for how they treated her, and realized selling Arbalest goods to the black market would be the best way to bite back, but in order to do so she needed to pull a heist. Ashe and B.O.B would then drive by the Ace Valentine megafarm to pick up Cassidy, and together they started to assemble a team to steal from the Arbalest facilities her family controlled. A fellow farmhand,of Cass, Julian and a hired hacker going by Frankie would join their ranks, forming the start of the Deadlock Rebels.

They were not the only ones with this daring ideals, the harsh life after the crisis had led to the rise of gang activity across the now called "New West", and as Deadlock expanded across the country they would often come into conflict with other gang territories. During a confrontation with the Diamond backs, Julian would end up betraying the group, getting Cassidy captured, but with some help on the inside from Benito Sanchez, Ashe and Frankie would be able to not just rescue Cassidy, but to overthrow Diamonback leader ship out of their den. The remainder gang members would choose to follow their new leader, as Ashe slowly begane to form a name for herself in the New West
headlines: Gang violence in the new Wild West increases
Arbalest reports assets stolen after repeated heists

secondaryCountryPlaces.reasoning: Deadlock Gang begins to steal from Arbalest facilities

factionFilterPlaces.reasoning: A gang formed by Ashe to get back at her parents

events.name: Rebuilding the Past
events.description:
A notable trend across the world following the Crisis was the return to classical architecture. As many cities had been leveled by the war, many of them needed to rebuild from the ground up, changing greatly from how they used to look years prior. With the construction of the Temple of Anubis, Cairo gained a new Pyramid. As Lumérico built power plants across Mexico, their architecture was inspired by Aztec and Mayan architecture. And this trend can be seen across the world on many other sites. In Greece, a small Aegean island renamed itself to Illios and built a giant statue on the nearby coast, echoing stories of the Colossus of Rhodes. In Iraq, the ever-growing spire of the Oasis University calls back to the tales of the Tower of Babel, a never-ending spear or information growing into the sky.

But perhaps none of these rebuilt structures stands out more than the Colosseo Gladiatori. Italy had rebuilt the Colosseum and reopened it for the masses. The newly formed Gladiator games were a pageant that became a cultural touchstone of Rome in the wake of the crisis. Within the Arena Victoriae of the Colosseo, all sorts of events would be hosted to entertain both the public and the European elite. From one-to-one gladiator matches, to robotic chariot races, mech fights and even stand-offs against machines designed for war, much like those Anubis used in The Crisis.

The Colosseo grew over the years, and the champions of the Arena would quickly become influential figures in Europe too, as the Elites visiting the Colosseo would often sponsor their fights and take in profits from their victories.
headlines: Recontruction of old world strucutres begins across Europe
The newly build Colosseo opens to the public

secondaryCountryPlaces.reasoning: Grand Reopening of the Colosseo
Other examples of ancient inspire architecture in the new world

factionFilterPlaces.reasoning: A reopen Arena for pageant sports in Italy
Every growing University accumulating knowledge in a massive spire

events.name: Ye Anran is Born
events.description: On August 8th of 2056, Ye Anran was born. Raised to be the perfect prodigy, aspiring to transcend the sky-high expectations set by her parents, both of them Fire College graduates of Wuxing that commanded operations during the Crisis. At the age of three, they both personally trained her in academic and martial arts, enrolling her in competitive Wushu-taolu and classical dance classes as she grew older. Anran persevered through the pressure, training through injuries and breaking records every year, never finishing off the podium.

secondaryCountryPlaces.reasoning: Ye Anran is Born

events.name: The New West
events.description:
The rise of Gang violence across the American Southwest quickly became a topic of interest for Overwatch, and when needed, they would address these gangs individually by dispatching agents, and later send the engineering teams for repairs. Among the gangs, the rising threat of the Deadlock Rebels became of special concern to Reyes. The leader, Calamity Ashe was fast at forming alliances with other rival gangs, and had created a stranglehold on the region. Reyes would take a small team of troops to investigate the situation personally. After gathering intelligence on the gang, a massive operation to take down the Rebels was put into action.

Cole Cassidy, a founding member of the gang, would create a distraction that resulted in his arrest, but allowed the rest of the leadership to escape. Ashe, Frankie and Bez would continue to search for him in hopes of rescue, but they did not know that it was too late for that, as Cassidy had been taken by Overwatch, not as a prisoner but as a willing recruit.

Reyes saw talent in Cassidy, and thus he gave him the choice, to either rot in jail for years, or to come with him as his student, and make better use of his marksmanship as an Overwatch agent. While many saw his inclusion as conscription of a minor, he seemed pleased with the arrangement and quickly proved himself to be an efficient asset. He would be placed under Ana's wing to hone his skills with the gun, and soon after, he would join Reyes in the Blackwatch division.
headlines: Overwatch cracks down on Gang violence globally
Gabriel Reyes recurits a minor into special division

secondaryCountryPlaces.reasoning: Overwatch cracks down on Gang Violence across the New West

Nearly captured by Overwatch, on the loose

Major gang in the New West, dismantled by Overwatch

Blackwatch Operator

events.name: On the Run
events.description:
While the US publicly seemed OK with SEP soldiers vanishing into obscuring, something about Soldier: 00 appears to be different. Kendra Banks had been the first candidate for the Soldier Enhancement Program, and much like the rest of Project Naughton, her service was heavily redacted and poorly documented. What little is known suggests she defected from the program shortly after her procedure and has been in hiding ever since. Kendra hoped living in Appalachia would keep her and her family hidden, but only a year after her daughter Sierra was born, Kendra would be found.

Kendra Banks, now going by Kendra Woods, fled into the night and took Sierra with her, as government agents raided their house asking questions about Project Naughton to her husband, James Turner. Ever since that day, Sierra has lived on the run, bouncing from one school to another, completely unaware of her mother's past. Each time they were found, they would have to move out quickly, and to calm little Sierra down, Kendra knew how to make a game out of evacuation and protocol.

Through it all, Sierra lived a relatively normal life. While she was always the new kid and had little to no friends due to this, she always placed at the top of her class and demonstrated innate physical skills and sharp thinking. While she always attributed this to her mother's teachings, little did she know one of Doctor Naughton's main hypothesis with the Soldier Enhancement Program, was the possibility of children inheriting the modifications.
headlines: US Government publicly allows SEP Soldiers to remain anonymous

events.name: Hana Song is Born
events.description:
On June 22th or 2057, Hana Song was born in Busan. Her father was a former professional gamer during his youth and he would bond with his daughter through the hobby, playing early century classics like StarCraft with her, which quickly made it apparent Hana had excellent skills, just like her father.

Hana would grow up to be a heavily competitive woman, staying up late with her childhood friend Dae-Hyun to work on his hover bike. She would often race and on one occasion she managed to win, at the cost of the bike and nearly taking her own life due to the reactor overloading.

secondaryCountryPlaces.reasoning: Hana Song is Born

npcFilterPlaces.reasoning: Childhood Friend

events.name: Mizuki Kawano is Born
events.description: On April 9th of 2057, Mizuki Kawano was born in Fukuoka, under the shadow of misfortune. Ever since he was a baby, his family had been surrounded by unexplained tragedy. His grandparents suddenly lost to unnatural causes, and years later his mom would drown in a freak accident. His father, quite the superstitious man, was quick to assume the bloodline must have been cursed, and from there Mizuki's life would only continue to go downhill. As the mental state of his dad worsened, he ingrained the idea of a curse in the poor kid's head, telling him tales of all the malevolent spirits that haunted the family ever since he was born.

secondaryCountryPlaces.reasoning: Mizuki Kawano is Born

events.name: Vancouver Floods
events.description:
Overwatch aided in the rebuilding efforts all around the world. In the words of Torbjörn himself, they were "The Janitors of the Apocalypse", and their efforts became invaluable in getting the world back together.

The engineering team was working on repairing the Canadian pipeline system when a massive storm struck, causing much of British Columbia to flood all the way down to Seattle.

Overwatch's quick response allowed the displaced locals to survive the disaster, as both a field team and support staff were sent to assist in the evacuation of both people and wildlife. Thanks to Overwatch the situation was dealt with swiftly and with minimal losses. Once the water receded, Amari coordinated with local authorities to distribute resources with the refugees, while Lindholm's team began the construction of a series of Dams and bridges across the West Coast, to reroute water out to the sea.

The Vancouver Flood response made headlines and many proved Overwatch's worth in a post-crisis world, showing that, in spite of their superhuman capabilities, they were also more than willing to come down and help with the dirty work.

events.name: Building Coalitions
events.description:
As Overwatch expanded and aided the world heal, they sought to form good relationships with other peacekeeping operations around the globe, particularly those that didnt make a part of the original recruitment process during the Crisis. Just like how Doomfist chose to protect his own home over joining Overwatch, many other groups like the Inti Warriors of Peru or the Caribbean Coaliton rejected Adawe's proposal, oftne due to intense regional pressure and concerns joining Overwatch would leave their home undefended. Morrison outreach groups all over the world, from Peru to Polynesia, Jordan and Bangladesh to try and collaborate in the post-Crisis landscape, but one of these partners proved to be closer than the rest.

The Caribbean Coaltion remained strong even as the Crisis ended, but it quickly fueled concerns among the governments of the Caribbean and Latin America that the alliance defied their sovereignty. This was part of a global wave of nationalism following the Crisis, as many nations, struck by years of violence and destruction, chose to spend resources inward. The Coaltion defied that mindset, and understood that without sharing their resources in these dire times the Caribbean would never bounce back. The Concerned Nations requested Overwatch to intervene and dismantle the rouge Coalition at once, but to everyone's surprise, Commander Morrison chose to aid the Coalition's efforts instead, deploying the strike team and much of the medical crew, including Angela Ziegler herself. To the people of the Caribbean, Overwatch were more than welcome, and a wave of recruitments soon followed, but the governments soon would come to resent this response and in the years to follow they would be less inclined to speak positively of Overwatch.

During this period, a young orphan, Jean-Baptiste Augustin, would await the day he could enlist into Overwatch, hoping he could be a medic alongside his heroes. However, as the governments resisted their presence, Overwatch recruitment would never come to Haiti, so without many other options to survive, Baptiste chose to join the military, working as a combat medic for the Caribbean Coalition, hoping one day he could be like the heroes from the posters.
